name: Western Tofu Scramble
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Red pepper, in julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave potato for 5-6 minutes or use baked potato.
2. Cool and slice thin.
3. Add crumbled tofu to melted margarine in a teflon skillet.
4. Add 2 dashes of turmeric and cook on high for 5 minutes.
5. Add vegetables and potato and cook 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender crisp.
6. Stir in picante sauce and serve.
Makes two 1 1/3 cup servings.
